description: It's femininty celebrated and enhanced with this pair of heeled slippers from Inc. 5. With it's sleek design and simple style, this pair works great both as an office wear and for parties.This pair comes with a shoe bag that helps you carry it around in ease.UpperSynthetic leather footbed ergonomically curved and padded for absolute comfort and styleIntertwined velvetty textile straps with soft plastic coated toe separator to hold the foot in place in styleOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with horizontal grooves and textured lugs at the heel and forefoot for ultimate grip and tractionSandal careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
